ab: kemuda u zuwa i kani?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: kemakawang ku zuwa.
en: I came on foot.

ab: muitras u za eman palizingan zuwa?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: muitras ku za bas zuwa.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: kemuda u mukuwa i kiyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: tu puitrasaw ku i malri kana tu palizing salrangan mi mukuwa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: kana wari ziya kemuda mukuwa i kungkuwan i intaw?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: muitras za ciyēyun mukuwa i kungkuwan intaw.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: i temu na vavayan kemuda mukuwa tremima’a za sasiyawan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: miotobay i mulri mukuwa tremima’a za sasiyawan.
ch: B:我奶奶騎摩托車去買菜。
en: B: My grandmother went to the grocery store by motorcycle.

ab: kakuda u mukuwa i Vutrulr?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: waitras ku za sudang mukuwa i Vutrulr.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: kemuda mukuwa i Vutrulr i intaw?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: muitras za hikuki mukuwa i Vutrulr i intaw.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: muitras za eman palizing mukuwa i Takaw intaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: muitras kana pa’a’evut na kissiya mukuwa i Takaw i intaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: muitras za kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ai, muitras za kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: i intaw mu muitras za kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: melri, muitras za hikuki mukuwa i Valangaw intaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: i kani dalrep mu ulra a waitrasan za bas?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: ulra , mungawayan ta mu nana’u ta kana waitrasan za bas.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: na adalrep kani na ciyēyun ulra i iyan?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: uniyan za ciyēyun i kania, maw maw a hayya karuwa u muitras.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: muitras ta za bas nu aidan raredek ta i kungkuwan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: nu muketrep misama’ za lruwatra pungkang mu meredek i kungkuwan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: nu muitras ta kana pa’a’evut na kisiya nu aidan raredek ta i Taicung?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: nu saya tuki mu raredek ta i Taicung.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: nu pakakawang ta za palizing mukuwa i Ulay mu kasawarariyan?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: aruwa saya tuki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: muitras u za ciyēyun zuwa kaniyam kasawarariyan?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: aruwa makavetra’an pungkang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: sayhu u muitras za cidinsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: sayhu ku muitras za cidinsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: ulra nu otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ulra ku otobay a saya.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: ulra nu otobay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: uniyan ku za otobay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
